summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Enhanced Qualitative Step 3 with M&A-grade features. All 12 requested features verified working with 100% pass rate.
passed_tests: Step 3 header shows completion counter (X/5) - shows '1/5' initially, updates to '5/5' when all dimensions selected - VERIFIED
Circular progress indicator next to completion counter - SVG with stroke-dasharray updating based on completion percentage - VERIFIED
Product Maturity slider (1-5) with labels (MVP, Traction, PMF, Scaling, Leader) and score display (3/5) - VERIFIED
Market Size cards (Small/Medium/Large) with TAM info (<$1B, $1-10B, >$10B) and multiple impact (-0.3x, Baseline, +0.5x) - VERIFIED
Competitive Moat cards (Low/Medium/Strong) with multiple impact shown (-0.3x, Baseline, +0.5x) - VERIFIED
Founder Dependency cards (Low/Medium/High) - NEW dimension with impact labels (+0.3x (transferable), Baseline, -0.5x (key-person risk)) - VERIFIED
Sales Predictability cards (Self-serve/Mixed/Enterprise) - NEW dimension with impact labels (+0.3x (scalable), Baseline, -0.2x (unpredictable)) - VERIFIED
Qualitative Score summary panel appears ONLY when 3+ dimensions completed (hidden with 2 dimensions) - VERIFIED
Qualitative Score shows 0-100 (e.g., 88/100) with animated progress bar - VERIFIED
Strengths list shows positive factors in green (emerald-600) with checkmark icon - VERIFIED
Risks list shows negative factors in amber (amber-600) with warning icon - VERIFIED
Deal Readiness toggles (Audited Financials +0.2x, Revenue Verified +0.1x) with impact labels and emerald-500 checked state - VERIFIED
Enhanced tooltips show definition, example, and typical range (tested on Product Maturity tooltip) - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: EnhancedTooltip component properly implemented with title, definition, example, range fields in dark tooltip
getQualitativeCompletion() correctly counts 5 dimensions and calculates percentage for circular progress
calculateQualitativeScore() correctly generates 0-100 score with strengths/risks arrays

All data-testid attributes properly implemented: slider-product-maturity, btn-market-{small/medium/large}, btn-moat-{low/medium/strong}, btn-founder-{low/medium/high}, btn-sales-{selfserve/mixed/enterpriselumpy}, toggle-audited-financials, toggle-stripe-connected
Circular progress uses SVG with stroke-dasharray based on completion percentage
Card selection styling correctly uses border-[#0B4DBB] and bg-[#F0F7FF] for selected state
ValuationPreviewPanel integrates founder_dependency and sales_predictability adjustments (+0.3x/-0.5x and +0.3x/-0.2x respectively)
seed_data_creation: Created test user, session, and project for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhanced Qualitative Step 3 fully functional. All 5 dimensions work: Product Maturity (slider), Market Size (cards), Competitive Moat (cards), Founder Dependency (NEW cards), Sales Predictability (NEW cards). Completion counter X/5 with circular progress at header. Qualitative Score summary (0-100 with strengths/risks) appears only at 3+ dimensions. Deal Readiness toggles show +X.Xx impact. Enhanced tooltips show definition/example/range. Key test selectors: slider-product-maturity, btn-market-small/medium/large, btn-moat-low/medium/strong, btn-founder-low/medium/high, btn-sales-selfserve/mixed/enterpriselumpy, toggle-audited-financials, toggle-stripe-connected. Route: /valuation/new/{projectId}
